repo_prior_art.cite: none; the closest catalogue entries, stat_policy_regret_margin_overlap and stat_dose_response_minimax, concern different estimands and models.

published_prior_art.cite: ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024 uses the same standard discrete-confounder ATE model; this is a useful explicit calculation rather than a new published result.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no active catalogue entry studies large-alphabet discrete-confounder ATE polynomial approximation.

published_prior_art.cite: JiaoVenkatHanWeissman2015 gives the nonsmooth-polynomial/smooth-plugin architecture for separable functionals, and HanJiaoWeissman2020 gives a hybrid divergence estimator; neither proves the four-cell overlap-restricted ATE lemma.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; stat_policy_regret_margin_overlap is a matched causal minimax result for policy regret, not unrestricted discrete-confounder ATE.

published_prior_art.cite: ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024, Section 3.2, proves the displayed lower bound and explicitly leaves exploration of a polynomial estimator achieving it to future work.
It is an algebraic corollary of the proposed matched rate; ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024 supplies the fixed-alphabet parametric benchmark.
JiaoVenkatHanWeissman2015 and HanJiaoWeissman2020 establish related tuning architectures, but neither studies adaptation to an unknown causal overlap constant for this ATE functional.

structure_flags.label: thm:sharp-minimax
structure_flags.one_line: The open matched-minimax frontier is the kernel but is labeled a Theorem; relabel it as an open-ended question with the polynomial/factorial-moment route, or as a Conjecture only after specifying the estimator calibration.

soundness_flags.label: def:cell-functional and def:ate-functional
soundness_flags.one_line: The declared map \(\phi:[0,1]^4\to\mathbb R\) is undefined for nonzero vectors with either treatment-arm denominator zero, and \(q_k=(q_{000},q_{001},q_{010},q_{011})\) omits the category index; restrict \(\phi\)'s domain to the overlap cone plus zero and write \((q_{0k0},q_{0k1},q_{1k0},q_{1k1})\).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Recast thm:sharp-minimax as the headline open-ended question: construct a uniformly calibrated polynomial/factorial-moment ATE estimator matching the Zeng et al. lower bound; retain the explicit heavy/light split as its starting route.
Repair the cell-functional domain and all four-cell indexing, then state the overlap-restricted cone and its normalization explicitly so the approximation problem is a defined multivariate object.

Promote the headline back to a Conjecture only after giving an explicit degree, heavy threshold, approximation domain, coefficient normalization, and a concrete moment-matching prior or finite witness family.
Add precise anchors to Zeng et al. v3 Section 3.2 and its final paragraph, and compare the proposed cone approximation against the separable and divergence constructions assumption-by-assumption.

recommended_next_step: Repair the cell-functional definition and reclassify the unproved matched-rate headline as an OEQ with its existing construction route; then return for novelty review.
